passive.name: Pyromania
passive.description:
After casting 4 spells, Annie's next offensive spell will stun the target.

Annie begins the game and respawns with Pyromania available.

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate - Pyromania:}} '''Annie''' generates a [[stack]] of ''Pyromania'' whenever she hits an enemy with ''{{ai|Disintegrate|Annie}}'' or casts her other [[champion ability|abilities]], stacking up to 4 times, at which she gains ''Energized''.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Energized:}} '''Annie''' empowers her next cast of ''{{ai|Disintegrate|Annie}}'', ''{{ai|Incinerate|Annie}}'', or ''{{ai|Summon: Tibbers|Annie}}'' to consume all ''Pyromania'' stacks to {{tip|stun}} enemies hit for {{pp|1.25;1.5;1.75|1;6;11}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: '''Annie''' gains maximum stacks of ''Pyromania'' when the game starts and upon [[death|respawning]]. She will lose ''Energized'' and all ''Pyromania'' stacks upon [[death]].
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Annie''' does not lose any stacks upon entering or exiting {{tip|resurrection}}.
* Stacks are gained even if the ability is blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}.
* ''Pyromania's'' current stacks are represented by a counter under '''Annie's''' [[health bar]], visible to all players. It lights up when the empowered effect is available.
wiki_detail.tips:
* The stun applies to the first ability that lands when the stun is available. If you cast {{ai|Disintegrate|Annie}} followed by {{ai|Incinerate|Annie}} while the stun is available and ''Incinerate'' lands first, the stun will be applied through ''Incinerate''.
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Annie}} spell-casts generate stacks. At maximum stacks, her next offensive spell will consume them to {{tip|stun}} the target.

Q.name: Disintegrate
Q.description: Annie hurls a Mana infused fireball, dealing damage and refunding the Mana cost if it destroys the target.
Q.tooltip: Annie hurls a fireball, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage. If the target dies, Annie refunds the Mana cost and reduces the Cooldown by 50%.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Annie''' hurls a fireball at the target enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.description2: If this kills the target, 50% of the {{sti|cooldown}} is reduced and the {{as|{{sti|mana cost}}}} is refunded.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Annie}} hurls a fireball at the target enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If this kills the target, the {{sti|cooldown}} is reduced and the {{as|{{sti|mana cost}}}} is refunded.

W.name: Incinerate
W.description: Annie casts a blazing cone of fire, dealing damage to all enemies in the area.
W.tooltip: Annie projects a wave of fire, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Annie''' releases fire in a cone in the target direction, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Annie}} casts a blazing cone of fire, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.

E.name: Molten Shield
E.description: Grants Annie or an ally a shield, a burst of Move Speed, and damages enemies who strike her with attacks or spells.
E.tooltip:
Annie grants an ally champion {{ shieldblocktotal }} Shield for {{ shieldduration }} seconds and {{ movespeedcalc }} Decaying Move Speed for {{ movementspeedduration }} seconds. While the shield holds, enemies who hit the shielded ally with an Attack or Ability receive {{ damagereturn }} magic damage once per shield.

Tibbers always gains the effects of Molten Shield when summoned.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Annie''' grants herself or the target allied {{tip|champion}} and {{ui|Tibbers}} a {{tip|shield}} for 3 seconds and {{as|{{pp|20 to 50|key=%}}|movement speed}} {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} that decays over {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: While ''Molten Shield'' is active, enemies that deal damage to it take {{as|magic damage}}. This may only occur once per enemy per cast for each active ''Molten Shield''.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Molten Shield'' casts on ally if targeted or if very close to targeting them (within a range of 225); otherwise self casts.
* ''Molten Shield'' does not deal damage to {{tip|turret|turrets}} when attacked by them.
* Attacks that are {{tip|dodged}} or {{tip|blind|miss}} against the shielded target will not cause the shield to deal damage, while {{tip|block|blocked}} attacks still deal damage to the attacker.
* The reaction damage does not trigger from {{cai|Noxious Trap|Teemo}} and {{cai|Jack in the Box|Shaco}}.{{bug}}
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Annie}} grants herself or an allied champion—and {{ui|Tibbers}}—a {{tip|shield}} with a burst of {{sti|ms|{{as|move speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: While the shield holds, enemies who {{tip|basic attack}} it take {{as|magic damage}}.

R.name: Summon: Tibbers
R.description: Annie wills her bear Tibbers to life, dealing damage to units in the area. Tibbers can attack and also burns enemies that stand near him.
R.tooltip:
Passive: Annie gains {{ rpercentpenbuff*100 }}% Magic Penetration.

Annie summons her bear Tibbers, dealing {{ initialburstdamage }} magic damage. For the next {{ tibberslifetime }} seconds, Tibbers burns nearby enemies for {{ tibbersauradamage }} magic damage per second.

Tibbers becomes enraged when summoned, if Annie stuns an enemy champion, and if Annie dies. When enraged, Tibbers gains 275% Attack Speed and 100% Move Speed decaying over 3 seconds.

Recast: Manually issue orders to Tibbers.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Annie''' summons {{ui|Tibbers}} to the target location in a burst of flame, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies near him. ''Summon: Tibbers'' can be recast at any time while {{ui|Tibbers}} is alive.
wiki_detail.description2: {{ui|Tibbers}} then remains on the field as a controllable {{tip|pet}} for up to 45 seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Summon: Tibber's recast can be used while affected by {{tip|cast-inhibiting crowd control}}. See [[Annie/LoL#Pets|Pets]] for more details about {{ui|Tibbers}}.''
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|250|Summon impact radius}} / {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|350|Tibbers' aura radius}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Burst of flame deals {{tip|area damage}} and ''Tibbers' '' basic attacks apply {{tip|pet damage}}.
* Tibbers will {{tip|blink}} back next to '''Annie''' if he gets too far away.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Annie}} summons her bear {{ui|Tibbers}}, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies in the area.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{ui|Tibbers}} deals {{as|magic damage}} with his attacks and also burns nearby enemies. Re-cast to direct him.
